# Measurement Framework

## North Star Metric
Demo calls booked per week

## Secondary KPIs
- Emails sent
- Reply rate (%)
- Positive reply rate (%)
- Meetings booked
- Pipeline generated ($)

## Conversion Funnel
Lead → Reply → Qualified → Booked → Deal

## Review Cadence
- Daily: n8n summary at 17:00
- Weekly: Friday retrospective
- Monthly: Full campaign review
